controls.control_objective: To ensure issue directions to authorised persons through a
controls.control_description:
It may be noted that, whenever necessary, Reserve Bank shall issue directions to
Authorised Persons through A.P.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue directions to authorised persons through a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be amended suitably simultaneously
controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued
herewith shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean authorised dealer category-i banks, standalone primary dealers authorised as authorised dealer category-iii and for the purpose of exchange trade
controls.control_description:
Authorised Persons shall mean Authorised Dealer Category-I banks, Standalone
Primary Dealers authorised as Authorised Dealer Category-III and for the purpose of
exchange traded currency derivatives, Recognised Stock Exchanges and Recognised
Clearing Corporations, authorised under Section 10 (1) of the FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean authorised dealer category-i banks, standalone primary dealers authorised as authorised dealer category-iii and for the purpose of exchange trade

controls.control_objective: To ensure currency risk arising on account of current or capital account transactions permissible under the fema, 1999 or any rules or regulations made thereund
controls.control_description:
(a) 'Anticipated exposure' means currency risk arising on account of current or
capital account transactions permissible under the FEMA, 1999 or any rules or
regulations made thereunder, that are proposed to be entered into in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to currency risk arising on account of current or capital account transactions permissible under the fema, 1999 or any rules or regulations made thereund

controls.control_objective: To ensure currency risk arising on account of current or capital account transactions permissible under the fema, 1999 or any rules or regulations made thereund
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Contracted exposure' means currency risk arising on account of current or
capital account transactions permissible under the FEMA, 1999 or any rules or
regulations made thereunder, that have been entered into.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to currency risk arising on account of current or capital account transactions permissible under the fema, 1999 or any rules or regulations made thereund

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the master direction - money changing activities dated january 01, 2016, as amended from time to time, or any other rule, regulation or
controls.control_description:
Directions for OTC foreign exchange transactions
Note: Money changing transactions are not in the scope of these Directions and shall
be governed by the Master Direction - Money Changing Activities dated January 01,
2016, as amended from time to time, or any other rule, regulation or Direction issued
in this regard.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the master direction - money changing activities dated january 01, 2016, as amended from time to time, or any other rule, regulation or

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify users as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering foreign exchange derivative contracts and foreign currency interest rate derivative
controls.control_description:
(i) Authorised Dealers shall classify users as retail or non-retail for the purpose of
offering foreign exchange derivative contracts and foreign currency interest rate
derivative contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify users as retail or non-retail for the purpose of offering foreign exchange derivative contracts and foreign currency interest rate derivative

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.control_description: (ii) The following users shall be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to be classified as non-retail users:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iii) Any user who is not eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall be classified
as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to get classified as a retail user
controls.control_description:
(iv) Any user who is otherwise eligible to be classified as a non-retail user shall have
the option to get classified as a retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to get classified as a retail user

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option to get classified as a non-retail user subject to the condition that the user makes a request to an authorised dealer in this regard a
controls.control_description:
(v) Any user who is otherwise eligible to be classified as a retail user shall have the
option to get classified as a non-retail user subject to the condition that the user makes
a request to an Authorised Dealer in this regard and the Authorised Dealer is satisfied
that the user has the risk management capabilities suitable for classification as a non-
retail user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option to get classified as a non-retail user subject to the condition that the user makes a request to an authorised dealer in this regard a

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer the following foreign exchange contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to users (both retail and non-retail):
controls.control_description:
(i) Authorised Dealers may offer the following foreign exchange contracts, involving
INR or otherwise, to users (both retail and non-retail):
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer the following foreign exchange contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to users (both retail and non-retail):

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer foreign exchange cash, tom and spot contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to users for permissible current or capital account transactions
controls.control_description:
(i) Authorised Dealers may offer foreign exchange cash, tom and spot contracts,
involving INR or otherwise, to users for permissible current or capital account
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer foreign exchange cash, tom and spot contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to users for permissible current or capital account transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer deliverable foreign exchange derivative contracts involving inr to users for the purpose of hedging
controls.control_description:
(ii) Authorised Dealers may offer deliverable foreign exchange derivative contracts
involving INR to users for the purpose of hedging.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer deliverable foreign exchange derivative contracts involving inr to users for the purpose of hedging

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer nddcs involving inr to resident users for the purpose of hedging and to non-resident users without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(iii) Authorised Dealer Category-I banks with an operating IFSC Banking Unit and
Standalone Primary Dealers authorised as Authorised Dealer Category-III may offer
NDDCs involving INR to resident users for the purpose of hedging and to non-resident
users without any restriction in terms of purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer nddcs involving inr to resident users for the purpose of hedging and to non-resident users without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer deliverable and non-deliverable foreign exchange derivative contracts not involving inr to users without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(iv) Authorised Dealers may offer deliverable and non-deliverable foreign exchange
derivative contracts not involving INR to users without any restriction in terms of
purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer deliverable and non-deliverable foreign exchange derivative contracts not involving inr to users without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer foreign currency interest rate derivatives to users without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(v) Authorised Dealers may offer foreign currency interest rate derivatives to users
without any restriction in terms of purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer foreign currency interest rate derivatives to users without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer currency swaps to resident users, other than individuals, for the purpose of converting their inr liability into a foreign currency liability
controls.control_description:
(vi) Authorised Dealers may offer currency swaps to resident users, other than
individuals, for the purpose of converting their INR liability into a foreign currency
liability.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer currency swaps to resident users, other than individuals, for the purpose of converting their inr liability into a foreign currency liability

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the existence of a natural hedge
controls.control_description:
In case of resident retail users, such conversion shall be subject to the
existence of a natural hedge.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the existence of a natural hedge

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that:
controls.control_description:
(i) While offering a foreign exchange derivative contract involving INR to a user, other
than NDDCs involving INR offered to non-resident users, and during the life of such
contracts, Authorised Dealers shall ensure that:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be made if, in the considered opinion of the authorised dealer, the change in exposure is not material
controls.control_description:
No adjustment to the hedge is required to be made if, in the considered opinion
of the Authorised Dealer, the change in exposure is not material;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made if, in the considered opinion of the authorised dealer, the change in exposure is not material

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably adjusted unless such divergence has occurred on account of changes in the market value of the exposure, in which case the user may, at his
controls.control_description:
(d) In cases where the value of the exposure falls below the notional of the
derivative, the notional should be suitably adjusted unless such divergence
has occurred on account of changes in the market value of the exposure, in
which case the user may, at his discretion, continue with the derivative contract
till its original maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably adjusted unless such divergence has occurred on account of changes in the market value of the exposure, in which case the user may, at his

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be made if, in the considered opinion of the authorised dealer, the change in exposure is not material
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be made if, in the considered opinion of the authorised dealer, the change in exposure is not material

controls.control_objective: To ensure be booked on the basis of reasonable estimates
controls.control_description:
(e) Where the value of the exposure is not ascertainable with certainty,
derivative contracts may be booked on the basis of reasonable estimates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be booked on the basis of reasonable estimates

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed periodically to ensure compliance with (c) and (d) above
controls.control_description:
Such estimates should be reviewed periodically to ensure compliance with (c)
and (d) above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed periodically to ensure compliance with (c) and (d) above

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit users to take position up to usd 100 million equivalent of notional value (outstanding at any point of time), across all authorised dealers, fo
controls.control_description:
Provided that Authorised Dealers shall permit users to take position up to USD
100 million equivalent of notional value (outstanding at any point of time),
across all Authorised Dealers, for hedging contracted exposure without the
requirement to establish the existence of underlying exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit users to take position up to usd 100 million equivalent of notional value (outstanding at any point of time), across all authorised dealers, fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform users that while they are not required to establish the existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure the existence of a valid underlying contracted exposure which has not been hedged using any other derivative contract and should be in a position to establish the same
controls.control_description:
Authorised
Dealers shall inform users that while they are not required to establish the
existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure the existence of a valid
underlying contracted exposure which has not been hedged using any other
derivative contract and should be in a position to establish the same, if
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform users that while they are not required to establish the existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure the existence of a valid underlying contracted exposure which has not been hedged using any other derivative contract and should be in a position to establish the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow users to freely cancel and rebook derivative contracts
controls.control_description:
(ii) Authorised Dealers shall allow users to freely cancel and rebook derivative
contracts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to allow users to freely cancel and rebook derivative contracts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be passed on to the eligible user only at the time of the cash flow of the anticipated transaction
controls.control_description:
However, net gains (gains over and above losses, if any) on derivative
contracts booked to hedge an anticipated exposure shall be passed on to the eligible
user only at the time of the cash flow of the anticipated transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be passed on to the eligible user only at the time of the cash flow of the anticipated transaction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be transferred on a pro-rata basis
controls.control_description:
In case of part
delivery, net gains shall be transferred on a pro-rata basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be transferred on a pro-rata basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure , in exceptional cases, pass on the net gains
controls.control_description:
(iii) Authorised Dealers may, in exceptional cases, pass on the net gains, if any, on
derivative contracts booked to hedge an anticipated exposure whose underlying cash
flow has not materialised, provided the Authorised Dealer is satisfied that the absence
of cash flow is on account of factors which are beyond the control of the user.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , in exceptional cases, pass on the net gains

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record by the authorised dealer
controls.control_description:
Such
instances along with specific justification, shall be kept on record by the Authorised
Dealer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record by the authorised dealer

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for such documents from users as they deem necessary for complying with the requirements of these directions
controls.control_description:
(iv) Authorised Dealers may call for such documents from users as they deem
necessary for complying with the requirements of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for such documents from users as they deem necessary for complying with the requirements of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the mid-market mark / bid and ask price of the derivative before entering into the contract and the same must also be included in the deal con
controls.control_description:
(v) While offering foreign exchange derivative / foreign currency interest rate
derivative to the retail user, Authorised Dealers shall provide the mid-market mark /
bid and ask price of the derivative before entering into the contract and the same must
also be included in the deal confirmation / term sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the mid-market mark / bid and ask price of the derivative before entering into the contract and the same must also be included in the deal con

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal with a non-resident user either directly or on a back-to-back basis through overseas entities (including overseas branches
controls.control_description:
(vi) While offering a foreign exchange derivative contract involving INR to a non-
resident (or its central treasury / group entity, where applicable), Authorised Dealers
may deal with a non-resident user either directly or on a back-to-back basis through
overseas entities (including overseas branches, IFSC Banking Units, wholly owned
subsidiaries and joint ventures of Authorised Dealers) subject to the following
conditions:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal with a non-resident user either directly or on a back-to-back basis through overseas entities (including overseas branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the central treasury / group entity is appropriately authorised by the user to deal for and on its behalf
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the central treasury / group entity is appropriately authorised by the user to deal for and on its behalf

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide information, data or any other particular required by the reserve bank of india in respect of the aforesaid transactions in the manner and tim
controls.control_description:
(d) Authorised Dealers shall provide information, data or any other particular
required by the Reserve Bank of India in respect of the aforesaid transactions
in the manner and time prescribed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide information, data or any other particular required by the reserve bank of india in respect of the aforesaid transactions in the manner and tim

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that in the case of non-resident users, all payables incidental to the foreign exchange transactions are met by the user out of repatriable fun
controls.control_description:
(vii) Authorised Dealer shall ensure that in the case of non-resident users, all payables
incidental to the foreign exchange transactions are met by the user out of repatriable
funds and / or inward remittance through normal banking channels.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that in the case of non-resident users, all payables incidental to the foreign exchange transactions are met by the user out of repatriable fun

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021 issued vide rbi circular no
controls.control_description:
(viii) Market-makers in OTC markets shall comply with the Master Direction - Reserve
Bank of India (Market-makers in OTC Derivatives) Directions, 2021 issued vide RBI
Circular No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (market-makers in otc derivatives) directions, 2021 issued vide rbi circular no

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continued till the date of their expiry
controls.control_description:
(ix) Existing contracts booked under the provisions of the earlier Directions may be
continued till the date of their expiry.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continued till the date of their expiry

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform users that while they are not required to establish the existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure the existence of a valid underlying contracted exposure which has been not hedged using any other derivative contract and should be in a position to establish the same
controls.control_description:
Directions for exchange traded currency derivatives
Note: Recognized Stock Exchanges shall inform users that while they are not
required to establish the existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure
the existence of a valid underlying contracted exposure which has been not
hedged using any other derivative contract and should be in a position to
establish the same, if required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform users that while they are not required to establish the existence of underlying exposure, they must ensure the existence of a valid underlying contracted exposure which has been not hedged using any other derivative contract and should be in a position to establish the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure deal in or otherwise undertake the business relating to foreign exchange derivatives unless they hold an authorization issued by the reserve bank of i
controls.control_description:
3.1 Recognised Stock Exchanges and Recognised Clearing Corporations shall not
deal in or otherwise undertake the business relating to foreign exchange derivatives
unless they hold an authorization issued by the Reserve Bank of India under Section
10(1) of the Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deal in or otherwise undertake the business relating to foreign exchange derivatives unless they hold an authorization issued by the reserve bank of i

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer the following foreign exchange derivative contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to persons resident in india and persons resident outside india
controls.control_description:
(i) Recognized Stock Exchanges may offer the following foreign exchange derivative
contracts, involving INR or otherwise, to persons resident in India and persons
resident outside India:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer the following foreign exchange derivative contracts, involving inr or otherwise, to persons resident in india and persons resident outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the spot rate of the corresponding currency pair
controls.control_description:
(iii) The underlying for the foreign exchange option shall be the spot rate of the
corresponding currency pair.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the spot rate of the corresponding currency pair

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer foreign exchange derivative contracts involving inr to users for the purpose of hedging contracted exposure
controls.control_description:
(i) Recognized Stock Exchanges may offer foreign exchange derivative contracts
involving INR to users for the purpose of hedging contracted exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer foreign exchange derivative contracts involving inr to users for the purpose of hedging contracted exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure offer foreign exchange derivative contracts not involving inr without any restriction in terms of purpose
controls.control_description:
(ii) Recognized Stock Exchanges may offer foreign exchange derivative contracts not
involving INR without any restriction in terms of purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to offer foreign exchange derivative contracts not involving inr without any restriction in terms of purpose

controls.control_description:
(i) For exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contracts involving INR,
Recognized Stock Exchange shall ensure that:

controls.control_objective: To ensure also purchase call or put options to hedge their cross currency proprietary trading positions
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealers may also purchase call or put options to hedge
their cross currency proprietary trading positions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also purchase call or put options to hedge their cross currency proprietary trading positions

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed those of the underlying
controls.control_description: b) The value and maturity of the hedge should not exceed those of the underlying.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed those of the underlying

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to continue till the original maturity and should be marked to market at regular intervals
controls.control_description:
part or full, owing to the contraction of the value of portfolio, it may be allowed
to continue till the original maturity and should be marked to market at regular
intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed to continue till the original maturity and should be marked to market at regular intervals

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that there is no net receipt of premium, either direct or implied
controls.control_description:
Operational Guidelines, Terms and Conditions
a) While using products involving options, it may be ensured that there is no net
receipt of premium, either direct or implied.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that there is no net receipt of premium, either direct or implied

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed six months
controls.control_description: The tenor of such contracts should not exceed six months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed six months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available in india to meet local regulatory and crar requirements and, hence, these should not be parked in nostro accounts
controls.control_description:
Hedging of Capital
Users - Foreign banks operating in India
Product - Forward foreign exchange contracts
Operational Guidelines, Terms and Conditions
a) Tier I capital -
i) The capital funds should be available in India to meet local regulatory and
CRAR requirements and, hence, these should not be parked in nostro
accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available in india to meet local regulatory and crar requirements and, hence, these should not be parked in nostro accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be parked in nostro accounts but should remain swapped with banks in india at all times
controls.control_description:
Foreign currency funds accruing out of hedging should not be parked
in Nostro accounts but should remain swapped with banks in India at all times.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be parked in nostro accounts but should remain swapped with banks in india at all times

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rolled over on maturity
controls.control_description:
ii) The forward contracts should be for tenors of one or more years and may be
rolled over on maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rolled over on maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be within the position limit prescribed by the exchange for the usd-inr contract
controls.control_description:
(a) Authorised Dealers may undertake trading in all permitted exchange traded
currency derivatives within their Net Open Position Limit (NOPL) subject to limits
stipulated by the exchanges (for the purpose of risk management and preserving
market integrity) provided that any synthetic USD-INR position created using a
combination of exchange traded FCY- INR and cross-currency contracts shall have to
be within the position limit prescribed by the exchange for the USD-INR contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to have to be within the position limit prescribed by the exchange for the usd-inr contract

controls.control_objective: To ensure net / offset their positions in the etcd market against the positions in the otc derivatives markets
controls.control_description:
(b) Authorised Dealers may net / offset their positions in the ETCD market against
the positions in the OTC derivatives markets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to net / offset their positions in the etcd market against the positions in the otc derivatives markets

controls.control_objective: To ensure however stipulate a separate sub-limit of the nopl (as a percentage thereof) exclusively for the otc market as and when required
controls.control_description:
Keeping in view the volatility in the
foreign exchange market, Reserve Bank may however stipulate a separate sub-limit
of the NOPL (as a percentage thereof) exclusively for the OTC market as and when
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to however stipulate a separate sub-limit of the nopl (as a percentage thereof) exclusively for the otc market as and when required

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (financial services provided by banks) directions, 2016 dated may 26, 2016, as amended from t
controls.control_description:
5(c) While participating in the ETCD market, AD Category-I banks shall comply with
the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Financial Services provided by Banks)
Directions, 2016 dated May 26, 2016, as amended from time to time and Standalone
Primary Dealers authorised as Authorised Dealer Category-III shall comply with the
Master Direction - Standalone Primary Dealers (Reserve Bank) Directions, 2016
dated August 23, 2016, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the master direction - reserve bank of india (financial services provided by banks) directions, 2016 dated may 26, 2016, as amended from t

controls.control_objective: To ensure frame an appropriate policy and fix suitable limits for various treasury functions
controls.control_description:
General
The Board of Directors of Authorised Dealers should frame an appropriate policy and
fix suitable limits for various Treasury functions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to frame an appropriate policy and fix suitable limits for various treasury functions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be communicated to the reserve bank soon after the approval of the board / management committee
controls.control_description:
Position and Gaps
The net overnight open exchange position (Annex-I) and the aggregate gap limits
should be communicated to the Reserve Bank soon after the approval of the Board /
Management Committee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be communicated to the reserve bank soon after the approval of the board / management committee

controls.control_objective: To ensure freely undertake foreign exchange transactions as under: a) with authorised dealers in india: note :
controls.control_description:
Inter-bank Transactions
Subject to compliance with the provisions of paragraphs 1 and 2, Authorised Dealers
may freely undertake foreign exchange transactions as under:
a) With Authorised Dealers in India:
NOTE :

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to reserve bank in r returns
controls.control_description:
Form A2 need not be completed for sales in the inter-bank market, but all such
transactions shall be reported to Reserve Bank in R Returns.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to reserve bank in r returns

controls.control_objective: To ensure transact in non-deliverable derivative contracts (nddcs) with other ad category-i banks having ibus, standalone primary dealers authorised as authoris
controls.control_description:
Transaction in Non-deliverable derivative contracts (NDDC)
Authorised Dealer Category-I banks having an IFSC Banking Unit (IBU) (as specified
in circular no.RBI/2014-15/533.DBR.IBD.BC.14570/23.13.004/2014-15 dated April 1,
2015 (as amended from time to time)) and Standalone Primary Dealers authorised as
Authorised Dealer Category-III may transact in Non-deliverable derivative contracts
(NDDCs) with other AD Category-I banks having IBUs, Standalone Primary Dealers
authorised as Authorised Dealer Category-III and banks overseas.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to transact in non-deliverable derivative contracts (nddcs) with other ad category-i banks having ibus, standalone primary dealers authorised as authoris

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain balances in foreign currencies up to the levels approved by the board
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealers may maintain
balances in foreign currencies up to the levels approved by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain balances in foreign currencies up to the levels approved by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made in overseas money market instruments and/or debt instruments issued by a foreign state with a residual maturity of less than one year and rate
controls.control_description:
Such investments may be made in overseas money
market instruments and/or debt instruments issued by a foreign state with a residual
maturity of less than one year and rated at least as AA (-) by Standard & Poor / FITCH
IBCA or Aa3 by Moody's.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made in overseas money market instruments and/or debt instruments issued by a foreign state with a residual maturity of less than one year and rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure lay down country ratings and country - wise limits separately wherever necessary
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of investments in debt instruments other
than the money market instruments of any foreign state, Authorised Dealers' Board
may lay down country ratings and country - wise limits separately wherever necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lay down country ratings and country - wise limits separately wherever necessary

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 100 per cent of their unimpaired tier i capital or usd 10 million (or its equivalent), whichever is higher subject to conditions laid down in (
controls.control_description:
Loans/Overdrafts by Authorised Dealer Category-I banks
a) All categories of overseas foreign currency borrowings of AD Category-I banks,
(except for borrowings at (c) below), including existing External Commercial
Borrowings and loans/overdrafts from their Head Office, overseas branches and
correspondents outside India, International / Multilateral Financial Institutions [see (e)
below] or any other entity as permitted by Reserve Bank of India and overdrafts in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported
controls.control_description: In the case of option structures, the trade with highest notional amount shall be reported.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported
controls.control_description: User wise data where the exposures or the hedges (based on contracted or anticipated exposure) undertaken are above USD 25 million or equivalent shall be reported.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported
controls.control_description: In Part C, INR/FCY currency swaps based on Rupee Liability above USD 25 million equivalent shall be reported.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2024
controls.control_description: (DIR Series) Circular No.04 dated May 03, 2024
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2024

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared for a range of 150 paise around current spot level
controls.control_description:
Strike Concentration Report
Maturity Buckets Strike
1 week 2 weeks 1 month 2 months 3 months > 3 months
Price
This report should be prepared for a range of 150 paise around current spot level.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared for a range of 150 paise around current spot level

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as positive
controls.control_description:
When the Authorised Dealer owns an option, the amount should
be shown as positive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as positive

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as negative
controls.control_description:
When the bank has sold an option, the amount should be shown as
negative.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as negative

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared as of every friday and sent by the following monday
controls.control_description: Reports may be prepared as of every Friday and sent by the following Monday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared as of every friday and sent by the following monday

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for conversion purpose
controls.control_description: RBI reference rate and New York closing rates on the date of report may be used for conversion purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for conversion purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign exchange derivative contract which commits two counterparties to exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in diff
controls.control_description:
(a) 'Currency swap' means an OTC foreign exchange derivative contract which commits
two counterparties to exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in
different currencies on specified dates over the duration of the swap at a pre-agreed
exchange rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign exchange derivative contract which commits two counterparties to exchange streams of interest payments and/or principal amounts in diff

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc / exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an agreed amount of a cer
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Foreign exchange call option (European)' means an OTC / exchange traded foreign
exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy
an agreed amount of a certain currency with another currency at a specified exchange
rate on a specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc / exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an agreed amount of a cer

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of otc foreign exchange call options (european) o
controls.control_description:
(c) 'Foreign exchange call spread' means an OTC foreign exchange derivative contract
involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of OTC foreign exchange call
options (European) of same expiry and different strike price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of otc foreign exchange call options (european) o

controls.control_objective: To ensure a written otc foreign exchange call option where the writer of the option has a long position in the asset underlying the option
controls.control_description:
(d) 'Covered foreign exchange call option' means a written OTC foreign exchange call
option where the writer of the option has a long position in the asset underlying the option.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a written otc foreign exchange call option where the writer of the option has a long position in the asset underlying the option

controls.control_objective: To ensure a written otc foreign exchange put option where the writer of the option has a short position in the asset underlying the option
controls.control_description:
(e) 'Covered foreign exchange put option' means a written OTC foreign exchange put
option where the writer of the option has a short position in the asset underlying the option.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a written otc foreign exchange put option where the writer of the option has a short position in the asset underlying the option

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two business days la
controls.control_description:
(f) 'Foreign exchange forward' means an OTC foreign exchange derivative contract
involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two
business days later) at a rate agreed on the date of the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two business days la

controls.control_objective: To ensure an exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two busi
controls.control_description:
(g) 'Foreign exchange future' means an exchange traded foreign exchange derivative
contract involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more
than two business days later) at a rate agreed on the date of the contract, but does not
include foreign exchange forward.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract involving the exchange of two currencies on a specified date in the future (more than two busi

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc / exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an agreed amount of a ce
controls.control_description:
(h) 'Foreign exchange put option (European)' means an OTC / exchange traded foreign
exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell
an agreed amount of a certain currency for another currency at a specified exchange rate
on a specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc / exchange traded foreign exchange derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an agreed amount of a ce

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of otc foreign exchange put options (european) of
controls.control_description:
(i) 'Foreign exchange put spread' means an OTC foreign exchange derivative contract
involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of OTC foreign exchange put
options (European) of same expiry and different strike price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving simultaneous purchase and sale of equal number of otc foreign exchange put options (european) of

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving the actual exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified date (the near leg)
controls.control_description:
(j) 'Foreign exchange swap' means an OTC foreign exchange derivative contract
involving the actual exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified
date (the near leg) and a reverse exchange of the same two currencies at a date further
in the future (the far leg), at rates agreed at the time of the contract.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign exchange derivative contract involving the actual exchange of two currencies (principal amount only) on a specified date (the near leg)

controls.control_objective: To ensure a cash-settled otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlem
controls.control_description:
(k) 'Forward rate agreement' means a cash-settled OTC foreign currency interest rate
derivative contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on
the settlement date, the difference between a pre-determined fixed rate (FRA rate) and a
reference interest rate, applied on a notional principal amount, for a specified forward
period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a cash-settled otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract between two counterparties, in which a buyer will pay or receive, on the settlem

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest rate instrument o
controls.control_description:
(l) 'Interest rate call option (European)' means an OTC foreign currency interest rate
derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest
rate instrument or receive an interest rate on a notional principal at a pre-determined price
/ rate on a specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to buy an interest rate instrument o

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate call options (european) (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when
controls.control_description:
(m) 'Interest rate cap' means a series of interest rate call options (European) (called
caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period
when the underlying interest rate is above a rate agreed in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate call options (european) (called caplets) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign currency interest derivative contract where a market participant simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest ra
controls.control_description:
(n) 'Interest rate collar' means an OTC foreign currency interest derivative contract where
a market participant simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest
rate floor on the same interest rate for the same maturity and notional principal amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign currency interest derivative contract where a market participant simultaneously purchases an interest rate cap and sells an interest ra

controls.control_objective: To ensure a series of interest rate put options (european) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying int
controls.control_description:
(o) 'Interest rate floor' means a series of interest rate put options (European) in which the
buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying
interest rate is below a rate agreed in advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a series of interest rate put options (european) in which the buyer of the option receives a payment at the end of each period when the underlying int

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest rate instrument
controls.control_description:
(p) 'Interest rate put option (European)' means an OTC foreign currency interest rate
derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest
rate instrument or pay an interest rate on a notional principal at a pre-determined
price/rate on a specified date in the future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract that gives the buyer the right, but not the obligation, to sell an interest rate instrument

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign currency interest derivative contract in which two counterparties agree to exchange one stream of future interest payments for another
controls.control_description:
(q) 'Interest rate swap' means an OTC foreign currency interest derivative contract in
which two counterparties agree to exchange one stream of future interest payments for
another, applied on a notional principal amount, over a specified period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign currency interest derivative contract in which two counterparties agree to exchange one stream of future interest payments for another

controls.control_objective: To ensure an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract which involves simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an interest rate
controls.control_description:
(r) 'Reverse interest rate collar' means an OTC foreign currency interest rate derivative
contract which involves simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an
interest rate cap on the same interest rate for the same maturity and notional principal
amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an otc foreign currency interest rate derivative contract which involves simultaneous purchase of an interest rate floor and sale of an interest rate
